title: Guess Middle-earth From Just 3 Emoji — Only True Tolkien Nerds Clear All 6
dek: From the Shire to the Black Gate, can you name all six Middle-earth movies before the reveal gives it away?

items.reveal_title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
items.reveal_text: That there's some good in this world, Mr. Frodo... and it's worth fighting for.

items.reveal_title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
items.reveal_text: I can't carry it for you, but I can carry you.
True courage is about knowing not when to take a life, but when to spare one.

items.reveal_title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
items.reveal_text: I am fire. I am death.

items.reveal_title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
items.reveal_text: If more of us valued food and cheer and song above hoarded gold, it would be a merrier world.
